genmet_direction_regression.reason: The reduced selected-event artifact has reconstructed MET variables but no genMET/genMET_phi target. Training a genMET-direction regressor without a real target would fabricate labels, so this branch is documented as infeasible.
genmet_direction_regression.requested_approach: transformer regression of genMET direction / genMET phi followed by combined-mass construction

tau_antimuon_veto.note: The per-event selected_events.npz keeps the selected tau kinematics and isolation, not a separate anti-muon flag, so the veto is documented from the selection code path.
tau_antimuon_veto.requested: tight anti-muon veto on hadronic tau ID

transformer_discriminator.reason: No lightweight transformer/attention stack is available in the current pixi environment. Adding PyTorch or a tabular-transformer package would dominate this quick method update, so the comparison uses already-available xgboost and sklearn tree/neural-network models.

phase4a_rerun_instructions: Use best.spec.observable and best.spec.categories/category labels for templates.
Keep official L_int and N_gen weights from normalization_inputs.json.
Recompute pyhf workspace, expected_results.json, signal injection, GoF, systematics, plots, AN markdown, TeX, and PDF.
Restart Phase 4a 4-bot+bib review on the compiled PDF.
residual_blockers: MVA input and output modelling must be validated in Phase 4b before unqualified use.
No SVFIT mass, embedding, QCD estimate, or additional tau channels are available in this reduced pass.
Low-background bins require bin merging or toy validation if a refined low-yield category is promoted.
